title: 日本ダービーの後に・どうしたって

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature manages to beat Tokai Teio in the
Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, when she sees Tokai Teio retain a
positive outlook for the next race despite losing,
Nice Nature is stunned by their difference in
outlooks.
